description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a robust, oval-shaped body and a hard, textured exoskeleton. Its coloration ranges from deep brown on the carapace to lighter orange and tan hues on the legs and claws. The crab features two prominent, asymmetrical claws at the front, with one noticeably larger than the other, and eight segmented walking legs extending from the sides. The carapace is slightly domed and rough, with subtle ridges and natural markings. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front corners of the carapace, and no antennae are clearly visible. The overall appearance suggests a cooked or preserved specimen, commonly seen in seafood markets or urban food displays.
description: A lifelike crab with a brown, textured shell, large claws, and eight segmented legs, displaying natural coloration and detail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the crab's oval carapace, all legs, and both claws, with the larger claw partially visible.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the segmentation of the legs and the curvature of the carapace.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying both claws prominently, with the eyes on short stalks visible at the front.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view from the opposite direction, showing the underside of the claws and the arrangement of the legs.
